item.title: Flatten the Stack
item.description: Flatten a nested JSON column into individual rows in this intermediate data drill. Transform order records with embedded line items into a flat table format, then calculate total online sales. Ideal for practicing data transformation and aggregation skills.

item.title: Movie Metrics
item.description: Summarize the viewing activity for each Netflix user. Ideal for practicing logic-based feature engineering and aggregation.

item.title: Splitting the Field
item.description: Count the number of players who suited up at each position during the 2025 MLB season. Ideal for practicing aggregation based on multi-value fields.

item.title: Booking Breakdown
item.description: Calculate the occupancy rate for a hotel based on a list of reservations with check-in and check-out dates. Ideal for practicing date range expansion and filtering.

item.title: Rolling Up, Looking Back
item.description: Analyze monthly sales and track performance trends in this hands-on data drill. Group transactions by store and month, then calculate month-over-month changes to uncover key insights.

item.title: Streak Leaderboard
item.description: Identify the users with the longest daily active streaks based on their lessons completed. Ideal for practicing date comparisons, lag functions, and streak logic.

item.title: The Price is Right
item.description: Look up the price for each product based on the transaction date and historical price changes. Ideal for practicing slowly changing dimension (SCD) techniques.

item.title: Making the Cut
item.description: Group marathon runners into bands based on their finish times to see how the field is distributed. Ideal for practicing data binning and time calculations.

item.title: Org Chart Overhaul
item.description: Build reporting hierarchies, count direct and total reports, and map employee-manager relationships using organizational data. Ideal for practicing recursive logic and data modeling skills.

item.title: Spot the Sale
item.description: Match each order in a table with the promotion active on its date, if applicable. Ideal for practicing non-traditional joins based on date ranges or intervals.

item.title: Turning Bullish
item.description: Compare short-term and long-term moving averages for the S&P 500 to identify "golden cross" moments â signifying the start of a bull market. Ideal for practicing rolling calculations and conditional flags.

item.title: Estimate the Estate
item.description: Estimate missing property sale prices by using the price per square foot from properties within the same zip code and building class. Ideal for practicing imputing blank values using averages and conditional logic.

item.title: Cart Combos
item.description: Find which pair of products customers buy together most often at a grocery store. Ideal for practicing market basket (affinity) analysis and self-joins.
